articles.description: Rejected by Arsenal as a teenager, Federico Valverde has transformed himself into a Real Madrid legend - and was the main man in their Champions League win over Manchester City last week.
articles.title: Arsenal trial and self-doubt: How Federico Valverde became a Real Madrid legend

articles.description: Chelsea have been hit with a Premier League record fine of £10.75m and handed a suspended transfer ban. Here's what the written reasons said.
articles.title: How Chelsea signed a star team on hidden payments

articles.description: Former India captain Sunil Gavaskar says Sunrisers Leeds’ signing of Pakistan spinner Abrar Ahmed “indirectly contributes to the deaths of Indian soldiers and civilians”.
articles.title: Sunil Gavaskar says Abrar Ahmed signing 'contributes to deaths of Indians'

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your questions following the Chinese Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Lewis Hamilton, Ferrari's starts, rule changes and will McLaren and Red Bull benefit from month-long break?

articles.description: Tottenham, Chelsea and Manchester City all need something special to stay in the Champions League, but sides have recovered from three-goal deficits before.
articles.title: Champions League comebacks: Hope for Manchester City, Chelsea and Tottenham before second-leg ties

articles.description: Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappe is fit to face Manchester City in the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tie but midfielder Jude Bellingham will not feature despite travelling over the match.
articles.title: Champions League: Kylian Mbappe returns to Real Madrid squad for Man City but Jude Bellingham will sit out despite travelling

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats as Brentford take on Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE: Brentford vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - build-up, team news, score, stats, text commentary & head-to-head

articles.description: Bayern Munich rival Manchester United for Nottingham Forest's Elliot Anderson, Morgan Rogers could leave Aston Villa if they fail to make Champions League, Arsenal trio face uncertain future at the club, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Rogers, Martinelli, Lewis-Skelly, Nwaneri, Anderson, Tonali, Calafiori, Camavinga, David, Kvaratskhelia, Pellegrini

articles.description: In only his second UFC fight, undefeated Briton Luke Riley will take on Michael Aswell Jr in the co-headline bout at O2 Arena on Saturday.
articles.title: UFC London: Luke Riley set to co-headline in second UFC fight

articles.description: Former Wales captain Sam Warburton and former Scotland skipper John Barclay discuss their Six Nations teams of the tournament.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: BBC pundits team of the tournament
